messages.body:
Subject: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

Hi,

We are looking to restock. Do you have availability for BP102 and DOL-97? We need around 23 MT of each, with shipment in march this year.

Thanks.

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

Hi,

We can do both. For BP102 we can offer 23 MT in one lot. For DOL-97 we cannot fit 23 MT in a 40' FCL; we can do 18 MT per 40'. Would 18 MT work for DOL-97, or do you need the full 23 MT in two shipments?

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

We need the full 23 MT of DOL-97. Can we do 18 MT in the first shipment and 5 MT in a second shipment in may?

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

Yes. So we would have: BP102 – 23 MT, single shipment march; DOL-97 – 18 MT + 5 MT, two shipments may. Correct?

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

Yes, that works. Please send prices for both products.

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

BP102: USD 1325/MT CIF Busan for 23 MT, march.
DOL-97 (lecithin): USD 4.20/kg CIF Busan for 23 MT (18 MT + 5 MT), may. DOL-97 offer valid till 2026-03-15.

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

Can you do USD 4.00/kg for DOL-97?

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

We can do USD 4.10/kg for DOL-97; below that is not workable at current market.

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

OK. We confirm both: BP102 23 MT at USD 1325/MT, DOL-97 23 MT (18+5) at USD 4.10/kg, all CIF Busan, November. Vendor name for both: AG Lipids Pte Ltd.

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

Confirmed. We will issue one contract covering BP102 and DOL-97 with three shipment lines (BP102 23 MT; DOL-97 18 MT; DOL-97 5 MT), vendor AG Lipids Pte Ltd. You will receive it by end of day.

Best regards.

Subject: Re: Quote – BP102 and DOL-97

Thank you.
